perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and pinkish eye makeup speaks directly to the camera while smiling and gesturing. (2) Sequence of extreme close-ups on her lips: she applies a red base tint, dabs on cushion foundation to blur the edges, uses a lip liner for definition, and finally applies a glossy oil from a tube with a metal applicator. (3) She holds up the product tubes, shows color swatches on the back of her hand, and demonstrates the cooling metal applicator against her skin. A side-by-side 'Before' and 'After' comparison of her lip texture is shown. (4) The video ends with her blowing a kiss and holding the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Mandarin begins over a light, upbeat synth-pop background track. (2) The background music remains constant while the vocals shift into an instructional tone, describing specific steps. (3) The speaking pace increases slightly as the narrator lists product benefits; occasional 'sparkle' and 'pop' sound effects (SFX) are used to emphasize text pop-ups. (4) The audio fades out with a concluding friendly remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '最近小盒子整個被塞爆' (Inbox is stuffed), '韓國流行唇妝畫法來了' (Korean lip makeup trend is here), '無痛豐唇' (Painless lip plumping). (3) Instructional Text: Numbered steps from (1) to (5) detailing the application process. (4) Promotional/Content Text: 'ANNAEVERYDAY 蜜萃油', 'Made in Japan', '90% 的角鯊烷', '316L 不鏽鋼 SPA 頭', 'Vegan', 'Dermatest'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Feature Breakdown -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark brown hair, bangs, wearing a mauve/purple knit sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Mostly a plain off-white wall; one shot shows a bathroom or dressing area with white blinds.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Soft, bright studio lighting designed for beauty content.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Soft cross-fades between voice segments; continuous BGM track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and endorse the ANNAEVERYDAY Lustrous Cure Lip Plump Oil by demonstrating its role in achieving the trendy 'MulMul Lip' look and highlighting its premium ingredients and Japanese manufacturing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, mention of brand name, and detailed explanation of product certifications and benefits.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-saturation beauty filter, use of trendy Korean makeup terminology (MulMul Lip).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical beauty influencer editing styles with frequent cuts and close-ups to maintain engagement.
